reauth_confirm.title: [%key:common::config_flow::title::reauth%]
reauth_confirm.description: The Xthings (U-tec) integration needs to re-authenticate your account.

application_credentials.description:
To obtain credentials, open the Xthings / ULTRALOQ app, go to **Settings > OpenAPI**, and activate it. Copy the **Client ID** and **Client Secret** shown there.

Set the **Redirect URI** in the app to:
`{redirect_url}`
